category_sources: source_facts.description says it interacts with remote images and registries; official go-containerregistry cmd/crane README says crane is a tool for remote images and registries: https://github.com/google/go-containerregistry/tree/main/cmd/crane#readme
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is crane; official cmd/crane README heading is crane: https://github.com/google/go-containerregistry/tree/main/cmd/crane#readme
docs_sources: Official cmd/crane README provides install and usage overview; official recipes.md is linked from the README for common crane workflows: https://github.com/google/go-containerregistry/tree/main/cmd/crane#readme
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/google/go-containerregistry, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official cmd/crane README identify remote images and registries as the core domain: https://github.com/google/go-containerregistry/tree/main/cmd/crane#readme
